subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.8
question_html:
Which element is found in the 4th group, 6th period of the periodic table?

A. Selenium

B. Lead

C. Chromium

D. Hafnium
examiners_html: A very well answered question. 76% of the candidates were able to identify the element in the fourth group and sixth period of the periodic table as hafnium. The most commonly chosen distractor was lead which is in group 14 not 4.
